name: chitta-bridge
description: Soul memory, multi-model orchestration, discussion rooms, and web tools for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Soul memory, multi-model rooms, and rescue delegation
interface.longDescription: chitta-bridge gives Codex access to persistent soul memory (recall/remember), multi-model discussion rooms, web search/fetch, adversarial code review, background rescue jobs, and local GPU model orchestration via Ollama.
defaultPrompt: Review my code adversarially — challenge the design decisions
Rescue: investigate why the tests are failing
Search my soul memory for what I learned about MAG recovery
